extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AVERMAET launched an extremely early sprint with 1km to go on the uphill finish at Wadi Dayqah Dam, holding off COSTA to win and take red.
tactical_patterns: CHETOUT dominated intermediate sprints from breakaway to secure KOM jersey before peloton caught him pre-final climb.
KANGERT pulled for LÓPEZ on final climb before BMC took over, suggesting Astana unwilling to commit for uphill sprint.
VAN AVERMAET's 1km-from-finish sprint launch on uphill gradient caught favorites off-guard, too early for pure climbers to counter.

rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: positive: BMC delayed their lead-out until final kilometer, exploiting classics engine over pure climbers on dragging finish
rider_signals.CHETOUT Loïc: positive: aggressive jersey defense through breakaway sprint hunting shows willingness to burn matches for secondary classifications early tour
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: neutral: Astana protected him on final climb but didn't contest sprint, suggesting team avoiding early GC commitment
rider_signals.COSTA Rui: negative: world champion credentials couldn't bridge to VAN AVERMAET's early sprint despite uphill gradient favoring climbers
rider_signals.KANGERT Tanel: positive: strong tempo-setting for LÓPEZ on final climb indicates good early-tour form
